concerns.text: Constitution Principle III requires checksums recorded in state/projects/...yaml artifact_hashes map, but tasks T096/T097 only record to data/checksums.txt and manifest.json with no task to update the state YAML — this violates a non-negotiable constitution principle.

Constitution Principle V requires every research-stage artifact change updates state/projects/...yaml updated_at timestamp, but T099 implements governance invalidation without explicit task to update the timestamp.

Plan.md T005 requires 'Confirm Constitution Principles I-VII compliance in CI' but no corresponding task exists in tasks.md to verify all seven principles — this leaves constitution compliance unverified.

Plan.md Phase 0 (T000-T005) has no corresponding tasks in tasks.md with matching IDs — plan elements T000 (CLI interface), T001 (GitHub Actions), T002 (Monte Carlo framework), T003 (statistical verification), T004 (power analysis), T005 (Constitution compliance) lack traceable tasks.

T070 incorrectly describes evaluating 'inconsistency‑detection component' on real-world validation set when FR-031b and SC-031b explicitly require evaluating 'extraction accuracy component' — this is a fundamental scope mismatch that would validate the wrong metric.

T076/T096 and T077/T097 create duplicate checksum/manifest tasks recording to different locations (output/checksums.txt vs data/checksums.txt) without clarifying which is authoritative — this creates ambiguity for Constitution Principle III compliance verification.
